chunks.text: First we will discuss what is loss function. So here a definition is written. Loss function is a method of evaluating how well your algorithm is modeling your data set. You will not find a better definition of loss function than this.

chunks.title: Loss Functions in Deep Learning | Deep Learning | CampusX
chunks.text: It is very simple. Loss function is a mechanism which tells you that the algorithm which you have applied on your data set how good it is working or how bad it is working. That is the way to measure the performance of your algorithm.

chunks.title: Loss Functions in Deep Learning | Deep Learning | CampusX
chunks.text: So if the output of loss function is very big then it basically means your algorithm is performing poorly. If the value of your loss function is very small it basically means that your algorithm is performing great. Now what is loss function?

chunks.title: Loss Functions in Deep Learning | Deep Learning | CampusX
chunks.text: It is basically a mathematical function. Just like any mathematical function, loss function is also a mathematical function. Just like this is a function of x similarly loss function is a function of parameters of machine learning algorithm. So if you adjust the parameters, the value of loss function changes.

chunks.text: Let me explain you through an example. Suppose you are working on simple linear regression where you have some data like this and you are trying to fit a line on it. Now if you remember the loss function which we used

chunks.text: Now if you want to find the best line then you will either change in this m or b or both. So here this loss function is actually a loss function of m and b. So by changing in m and b, the value of loss function will change and you have to find the value of m and b
